message:
refactor(abi): migrate io_internal_abi from libc::syscall to native raw syscalls (bd-h5x)

Replace 8 libc::syscall calls with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- vtable_fd_read: libc::SYS_read -> raw_syscall::sys_read
- vtable_fd_write: libc::SYS_write -> raw_syscall::sys_write
- vtable_fd_seek: libc::SYS_lseek -> raw_syscall::sys_lseek
- vtable_fd_close: libc::SYS_close -> raw_syscall::sys_close
- vtable_fd_flush: libc::SYS_write -> raw_syscall::sys_write
- adopt_foreign_file: libc::SYS_ioctl -> raw_syscall::sys_ioctl
- _IO_fopen: libc::SYS_openat -> raw_syscall::sys_openat
- _IO_fopen: libc::SYS_close -> raw_syscall::sys_close

This eliminates glibc dependency for NativeFile I/O operations, advancing
the bd-h5x epic goal of raw syscalls without libc::syscall.

Also fixes RLIMIT_NOFILE type mismatch in rpc_abi.rs (unrelated pre-existing issue).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
